paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is 5.93, which represents a decrease of 5.12% from the prior close and 31.52% over the last 20 sessions. The price is as of July 16, 2026.

There have been 3 new news articles in the last 24 hours, with headlines including "Fermi (FRMI) Stock May Be Above Fair Value After Note Offering" and "Does Fermi (FRMI) Convertible Push Expose Deeper Governance Tensions Around Project Matador?" from Yahoo Finance, and "Fermi Cofounder Toby Neugebauer Says Market ‘Clearly Wants’ This As FRMI Stock Surges To Over 3-Month Highs" from Stocktwits.

Recent SEC filings include a Form 8-K disclosing the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another Form 8-K disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to a disagreement over access to company books and records. There has been 1 Form 4 filing in the feed.
